faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions we receive most often.

items.question: How does payment and the deposit work?
items.answer: After signing the contract, we issue a deposit invoice for 50% of the total price. The remaining balance is invoiced after the successful completion of the event, with a 7–14 day payment term. For larger projects over €5,000, we use a three-phase model: 40% at signing, 40% one month before the event, 20% after completion.

items.question: What is included in the package price and what is charged separately?
items.answer: The package price covers the agency fee (our time, coordination and management). Charged separately: supplier costs (catering, equipment, venues), travel beyond our base (€0.40–0.50/km), staff accommodation for events over 100 km away, and a 10–15% agency commission on Standard and Premium packages.

items.question: What are the cancellation terms?
items.answer: More than 30 days before the event: full deposit refund (excluding non-refundable supplier payments). 15–30 days: deposit is forfeited to cover work completed. 8–14 days: 75% cancellation fee of total price. 7 days or less: 100% of total price — at this point everything is purchased and staff are booked.

items.question: What if there is bad weather at an outdoor event?
items.answer: For outdoor events, we always define a contingency plan in the contract: an alternative indoor option or date postponement for a pre-agreed administrative fee. We never leave a client without a solution.

items.question: How many people do I need for a team building?
items.answer: The Standard package for team buildings is set at a minimum of 15–20 participants. For smaller groups we recommend the Basic package, where you deliver a programme for a few hours. There is no maximum participant limit.

items.question: Can you organise events outside Bratislava?
items.answer: Yes, we organise events throughout Slovakia. For travel outside our base we charge €0.40–0.50/km. For events more than 100 km away or with a late programme, the client also covers accommodation and meals for our team.

items.question: How quickly will you respond after I submit an enquiry?
items.answer: Within 24 hours on working days. We always attend key initial meetings together so you see the full agency from the very first meeting.

howItWorks.label: Process
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From first contact to the last guest — six steps that connect us.

steps.title: Enquiry and Consultation
steps.description: Write to us or call. The first consultation is always free and non-binding. Together we'll find out what your event needs.

steps.title: Package Selection and Contract
steps.description: Based on your vision and budget, we'll propose the right package. Once agreed, we sign a contract with clear terms.

steps.title: Deposit and Date Confirmation
steps.description: After signing, we issue a deposit invoice according to the agreed budget. The deposit secures your date and we begin preparations.

steps.title: Preparation and Coordination
steps.description: We arrange venues, suppliers, schedules and all logistics. You are kept informed but don't need to handle the details.

steps.title: Event Day — Delivery
steps.description: Our team is personally present throughout the event. We manage the programme, coordinate suppliers and handle everything for you.

steps.title: Final Invoice and Debrief
steps.description: After the successful event, we issue the final invoice. We welcome your feedback — every event helps us improve.

cookie.text: This website uses cookies to improve your experience. More info in our

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
sections.content: The data controller is Momentum Events, s.r.o. (hereinafter "Momentum Events" or "we"). Contact: info@momentumevents.sk

sections.heading: 2. Data We Collect
sections.intro: Through the contact form on this website, we collect:
list: Type of requested event and message

sections.heading: 3. Purpose of Processing
sections.content: We process your data solely for the purpose of responding to your enquiry and preparing an offer. We will not send you marketing materials without your consent.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies
sections.content: This website uses technical cookies essential for its operation. We use analytical cookies (e.g. Google Analytics) only with your consent, which you can grant or refuse in the banner on your first visit.

sections.heading: 5. Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes. We may share it with suppliers we contact directly in connection with your enquiry — always only to the extent necessary.

sections.heading: 6. Retention Period
sections.content: We retain personal data for the period necessary to process the enquiry, and for the duration of contract performance and statutory obligations (max. 5 years).

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights
list: Erasure of data (right to be forgotten)
Lodge a complaint with the Office for Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic
sections.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at info@momentumevents.sk.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this policy from time to time. We will inform you of significant changes via the website.
